page_metadata.biotools__summary: CellAnn is a web application for predicting cell types of single-cell clusters based on published reference datasets. CellAnn provides a comprehensive scRNA-seq reference database and users can easily find the relevant reference datasets in their analysis.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CellAnn is a web application for predicting cell types of single-cell clusters based on published reference datasets. CellAnn provides a comprehensive scRNA-seq reference database and users can easily find the relevant reference datasets in their analysis.
